zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Mortimer於大約1286年出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，她的父親Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer35歲，母親Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes38歲。她於1302年7月29日與Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun在英國賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1312年在英國斯塔福爾阿頓享年27歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Mortimer于大约1286年出生在英国賀福爾維格莫时，她的父亲Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer35岁，母亲Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes38岁。她于1302年7月29日与Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun在英国賀福爾維格莫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1312年在英国斯塔福爾阿頓享年27岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Mortimer was born about 1286, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, her father, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, was 38. She married Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun on 29 July 1302, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1312, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Mortimer est née environ 1286, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun le 29 juillet 1302, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1312, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Mortimer um 1286 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes 38. Sie hat am 29. Juli 1302 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1312 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Alton, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Mortimer è nata il circa 1286 nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun il 29 luglio 1302, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1312, nel Alton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Mortimerが約1286年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimerは35歳，母Margaret Eleanor de Fiennesは38歳であった。1302年7月29日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでSir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1312年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで27歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Mortimer(이)가 대략 1286년 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1302년 7월 29일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 영국 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Of, Ludlow, Shropshire, England: Ludlow, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Mortimer nasceu aproximadamente 1286, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun em 29 de julho de 1302, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1312, em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Mortimer родилась около 1286 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun 29 июля 1302 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1312 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Mortimer nació aproximadamente 1286, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Mortimer 2nd Lord Mortimer, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Eleanor de Fiennes, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun el 29 de julio de 1302, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1312, en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
